da.hero_subtitle: Verdens første vibroakustiske yogastudio. En multidimensional oplevelse, der kombinerer yoga med Dolby Atmos-lyd og vibrerende gulve for den dybeste afslapning.
da.what_text: Vibro Yoga er en revolutionerende yogaoplevelse, der kombinerer traditionel yogapraksis med avanceret vibroakustisk teknologi. Vores studiegulve vibrerer gennem musik og lydfrekvenser, der vækker kroppens sanser, fremmer blodcirkulationen og efterlader dig let og energisk.
da.what_text2: De blide vibrationer hjælper med at frigøre spændinger, reducere stress og skabe en harmonisk forbindelse mellem krop og sind. Det er yoga, som du aldrig har oplevet det før.
da.tech_text: Vibro Yoga bruger Dolby Atmos-teknologi til at skabe en unik og immersiv lydoplevelse, hvor lyd bevæger sig i alle dimensioner. Du kan mærke hver tone og vibration i hele kroppen.
da.tech_point2: Dolby Atmos surround-lyd i alle dimensioner
da.tech_point5: Multisensorisk oplevelse — lyd, vibration og bevægelse
da.ben1_desc: Vibrationer stimulerer det parasympatiske nervesystem og fremmer dyb afslapning hurtigere end traditionel yoga.
da.ben2_desc: Kombinationen af lyd, vibration og bevægelse reducerer kortisol og fremmer mental ro.
da.ben3_desc: Vibrationerne øger blodcirkulationen og hjælper kroppen med at udrense toksiner effektivt.
da.ben4_desc: Dolby Atmos-lyd og kropsvibrationer skaber en meditativ tilstand, der er dybere end traditionel praksis.
da.location_text: Vibro Yoga-studiet ligger i Christianshavn, København — det samme område som Hot Yoga Copenhagen. Book din første klasse og oplev fremtidens yoga.
da.cta_subtitle: En oplevelse du aldrig glemmer. Book i dag.

en.hero_subtitle: The world's first vibroacoustic yoga studio. A multidimensional experience combining yoga with Dolby Atmos sound and vibrating floors for the deepest relaxation.
en.what_text: Vibro Yoga is a revolutionary yoga experience that combines traditional yoga practice with advanced vibroacoustic technology. Our studio floors vibrate through music and sound frequencies that awaken the body's senses, promote blood circulation, and leave you feeling light and energized.
en.what_text2: The gentle vibrations help release tension, reduce stress, and create a harmonious connection between body and mind. It's yoga like you've never experienced it before.
en.tech_text: Vibro Yoga uses Dolby Atmos technology to create a unique and immersive audio experience where sound moves in all dimensions. You can feel every note and vibration throughout your entire body.
en.tech_point2: Dolby Atmos surround sound in all dimensions
en.tech_point5: Multisensory experience — sound, vibration and movement
en.ben1_desc: Vibrations stimulate the parasympathetic nervous system, promoting deep relaxation faster than traditional yoga.
en.ben2_desc: The combination of sound, vibration, and movement reduces cortisol and promotes mental calm.
en.ben3_desc: Vibrations increase blood circulation, helping the body effectively flush toxins.
en.ben4_desc: Dolby Atmos sound and body vibrations create a meditative state deeper than traditional practice.
en.location_text: The Vibro Yoga studio is located in Christianshavn, Copenhagen — the same area as Hot Yoga Copenhagen. Book your first class and experience the future of yoga.
en.cta_subtitle: An experience you'll never forget. Book today.
